name: ASPro-PD phase 3 ambroxol trial
summary: A multicenter phase 3 randomized trial protocol testing whether high-dose ambroxol slows progression in genetically stratified Parkinson disease. ClinicalTrials.gov still listed the study as recruiting with no posted results in the June 14, 2026 API check.
population: Parkinson disease patients with confirmed GBA1 status

trial_details.expected_results_window: ClinicalTrials.gov lists estimated primary completion in February 2029 and estimated study completion in September 2029; no results were posted in the June 14, 2026 API check.
trial_details.horizon_note: Recruiting with no posted results, so this belongs on watch lists rather than in the evidence base.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Lysosomal Restoration because they can show whether the intervention changes function, biomarkers, and safety in Parkinson disease patients with confirmed GBA1 status. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
